purpose: npm package manifest for the devenv MCP server (package name: devenv-mcp); declares the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency and defines the 'start' script that launches the server via node index.js.
invariants: type is 'module' — all JS files in this package use ES module syntax (import/export)
Entry point is index.js in the same directory
gotchas: Package version (1.0.0) lags the repo's VERSION file (1.2.0) — the MCP server version is tracked separately and must be bumped manually when server behavior changes
pnpm is the expected package manager for this directory (per repo conventions), but no pnpm lockfile field is declared here
